title: T-048 — UI: allergen changeover screen + full gate modal (SCR-08-03 / MODAL-08-11)
prompt:
# T-048 — Allergen changeover screen + dual sign-off gate modal UI

PRD: docs/prd/08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §8.1 SCR-08-03, MODAL-08-11, §6 D10, §7.7 (Allergen Gate FRs)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/other-screens.jsx:294-390 (changeover_screen); production/modals.jsx:306-326 (changeover_gate_modal — prototype stub explicitly expanded per Wave Next hardening)

## Goal
Replace the prototype changeover stub with a full multi-step allergen changeover wizard: risk-level banner, cleaning checklist with photo evidence, ATP swab grid + RLU threshold display + auto PASS/FAIL, dual sign-off (shift_lead + quality_lead) with PIN, and a typed `segregation_required` hard-block surface. Wires to T-043 endpoints.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/production/changeover/[event_id]/page.tsx (RSC) — changeover_screen parity: header (from WO → to WO, allergens delta, risk badge), 5-step status panel (Done/In Progress/Locked) driven by `changeover_steps.status`, cleaning checklist (`changeover_checklist_items` with `requires_photo`), ATP section (RLU input + locations + threshold + auto PASS/FAIL from `prod_settings.atp_rlu_threshold`), dual sign-off section (only enabled when checklist+ATP pass), Release-next-WO button disabled until both signed.
2. apps/web/components/production/changeover-gate-modal.tsx ('use client') — shadcn Dialog expanding the prototype stub: dual signer slots (Shift Lead + Quality Lead) reading server-derived `quality_signer_id`; PIN input per signer (masked, server-verified via T-043); `Sign & advance` disabled until Quality assigned; segregation hard-block renders an Alert with typed reason and disables all sign-off controls.
3. Cleaning checklist photo upload uses Vercel Blob; URL stored on `changeover_checklist_items.photo_url`; `requires_photo=true` blocks step completion until photo uploaded.
4. Literal `data-prototype-label` markers: `changeover_screen`, `changeover_gate_modal`. All copy via next-intl. axe accessibility pass required (focus trap on Dialog, ARIA on dual sign-off).

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the changeover screen renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/other-screens.jsx:294-390 and modals.jsx:306-326 (expanded per Wave Next hardening), then it has the same 5-step status panel + cleaning checklist + ATP grid + dual sign-off layout — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist + visible `data-prototype-label` markers.
2. Given a step requires a photo and none is uploaded, when the operator attempts to mark it complete, then the action is rejected client-side and server-side with `photo_required` and the step remains LOCKED.
3. Given the changeover row has `segregation_required=true`, when the screen renders, then all sign-off controls are disabled, a typed `segregation_hard_block` Alert is shown, and the Release-next-WO button cannot be enabled in Production.

## Test strategy
- RED: apps/web/app/production/changeover/[event_id]/__tests__/changeover.test.tsx + apps/web/components/production/__tests__/changeover-gate-modal.test.tsx asserting parity, photo-required block, dual sign-off enablement order, segregation hard-block, and `data-prototype-label` markers before code exists.
- Run `pnpm vitest run apps/web/app/production/changeover/[event_id]/__tests__/changeover.test.tsx apps/web/components/production/__tests__/changeover-gate-modal.test.tsx`
- For UI parity, capture screenshots + Playwright trace; attach paths.
- Run `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow sign-off to submit before checklist + ATP requirements pass (server-derived disabled state).
- Do not show PIN value in the DOM (masked input, no client logging).
- Do not let Production override `segregation_required` — disable the control, never silently bypass.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim; translate to shadcn primitives + next-intl.

pipeline_inputs.description: Expand prototype stub into full SCR-08-03 changeover wizard + MODAL-08-11 dual sign-off; segregation_required hard-block surfaced and unbypassable.
pipeline_inputs.details: Parity against prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/other-screens.jsx:294-390 (5 status sections, cleaning checklist, allergen-in/out info, Release-next-WO disabled state) and modals.jsx:306-326 (dual signature boxes, Quality select, PIN per signer — Wave Next hardening expands prototype stub into the full PRD spec). Photo upload to Vercel Blob; requires_photo=true blocks step completion. ATP auto PASS/FAIL derived from prod_settings.atp_rlu_threshold. Sign-off enablement is server-derived (not local state). Segregation hard-block renders as a typed Alert and disables all controls. axe accessibility pass required (focus trap, ARIA). UI closeout includes screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

Do not implement ATP device integration (P2 via 09-QUALITY)
Do not change allergen profile schema (03-TECHNICAL)
